name: Baked Pineapple Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Combine the reserved juice with garlic, cornstarch, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and rosemary in a bowl.
3. Arrange the chicken in a shallow baking pan or broiler-proof dish, skin side up.
4. Broil until the chicken is browned.
5. Stir the sauce and pour it over the chicken.
6. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
7. Arrange lemon and pineapple slices around the chicken.
8. Spoon any remaining sauce from the baking pan over the chicken.
9. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Garnish with fresh rosemary or parsley, if desired.
Prep Time: 10 minutes
Bake Time: 40 minutes
